::: {.cell execute='true'}

:::


## Individual quizzes with team support

- each made 2 rounds of 6 qeustionns questions individually
- round 1: select which question to discuss with team 
- round 2: question for team discussion is randomly pre-selected
- Questions:
  1. what is the effect of team discussion on question answer correctness?
  2. draw a directed acyclic graph for the problem
  3. what do you expect in terms of association between team discussion and final answer correctness
    - in round 1?
    - in round 2?
  4. can you design an analysis for answering the question using the data we generated?

include-after-body:
<script>
  // htmlwidgets need to know to resize themselves when slides are shown/hidden.
  // Fire the "slideenter" event (handled by htmlwidgets.js) when the current
  // slide changes (different for each slide format).
  (function () {
    // dispatch for htmlwidgets
    function fireSlideEnter() {
      const event = window.document.createEvent("Event");
      event.initEvent("slideenter", true, true);
      window.document.dispatchEvent(event);
    }

    function fireSlideChanged(previousSlide, currentSlide) {
      fireSlideEnter();

      // dispatch for shiny
      if (window.jQuery) {
        if (previousSlide) {
          window.jQuery(previousSlide).trigger("hidden");
        }
        if (currentSlide) {
          window.jQuery(currentSlide).trigger("shown");
        }
      }
    }

    // hookup for slidy
    if (window.w3c_slidy) {
      window.w3c_slidy.add_observer(function (slide_num) {
        // slide_num starts at position 1
        fireSlideChanged(null, w3c_slidy.slides[slide_num - 1]);
      });
    }

  })();
</script>
